violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap was noted not provided at hand washing lavatory in ware-washing room.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior not properly maintained needs routine cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Roll-carts need routine cleaning. Floor fan needs cleaning.
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Adequate ventilation noted not present in ladies restroom; fan not working.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Coolers and freezers noted with thermometer not in a conspicuous location.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Holes in walls need repair. Missing ceiling tiles need install. Ceiling vent covers need cleaning. Wet-stained ceiling tiles in mens restroom need replaced repair any water leaks. Missing ceiling tile in ladies restroom needs install.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior not properly maintained.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls and ceiling vents in the food prep area noted in need of cleaning. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floor tiles and wall corner strips in the food prep area noted need repair.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service cups and food containers noted being stored on the floor.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Refrigerator and freezers noted with no thermometers.
